title: Optimum Razor Rugby Ball (Multipack) - Perfect for Training & Gameplay, Great Flight & Air Retention, Rubber Dimpled Surface for Grip, 2-Ply 410g
features: (UNIVERSAL): The Optimum Razor Rugby ball comes in a wide array of colours and sizes, whether you are a youngster getting started in mini rugby or a senior rugby pro, our rugby balls are built to suit all ages.

(HIGH QUALITY): The Optimum Razor rugby balls are world-renowned for their superior grip, weight, and design. They’re equipped with a top-grade Korean natural rubber outer, Optimum super grip surface, and balanced weight for superior flight and accuracy.

(DURABLE): Our rugby balls are constructed sturdy enough to resist tears, cracks, and splits. They’re easy on the hands and feet whilst providing the experience that you deserve whilst in competition or training.

(MULTI-APPLICATION): The Razor Rugby balls are suitable for all variations of rugby, whether it's matchday, training or simply casual play with your friends/family, this ball is great for any scenario.

(DEFLATED SHIPPING): The rugby balls are shipped deflated to ensure that they won’t be damaged and stays intact for arrival. We advise you to purchase the Optimum pump to inflate the ball for your convenience.

Optimum Rugby balls The Optimum Rugby ball is constructed with a top-quality Korean rubber outer, including a long-lasting dimpled finish, for superior grip and tackiness in all weather conditions. These ball is ideal for club, school and junior rugby with hand stitched and balanced for superior flight. Hand Stitched The rugby balls are shipped deflated to ensure that it won’t be damaged and stays intact for arrival. We advise you to purchase the Optimum pump. Heavyweight Training Ball Balls are constructed sturdy enough to resist tears, cracks, and splits. Easy on the hands and feet whilst providing the experience that you deserve. Super Grip Surface The Optimum rugby balls are world-renowned for their superior grip weight, and design.Optimum super grip surface & balanced weight for superior flight Fun for all Ages You can play both indoors and outdoors with this ball to expand the conditions of your play and practice. Enhanced Grip Optimum Rugby Ball Series If you want a ball that won’t slip from your hands while playing, then Optimum rugby ball is just right for you! It has a natural rubber dimpled surface, which improves grip and prevents the ball from slipping out of your hands. Also, it is hand-stitched to offer added grip support. These rugby Training Ball weighs 410 grams and is made of durable 2-ply heavyweight material. It is developed for use in training and actual gameplay. High Quality The Optimum Rugby Training Ball is made of top-grade natural rubber outer material, which offers tackiness in all types of weather conditions. This rugby ball has undergone high standard process that perfectly match both actual rugby games and training play.
